text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after a day out, I'm enjoying
the gentle sway of the train when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...up. Wake... up. Trai...ner...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um! Please wake up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I conked out in my seat! As I regain my
bearings, I realize we've arrived at the final stop.
choice_data_list: Sorry I made us miss our stop!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, don't be! I should have woken you up sooner.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? The next train won't arrive for a
little while, so how about we go take a break until
then?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think I see a cafe over there! We can order
something and take it easy!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow... This place is so cozy. They have tables out
in the garden too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um... Since it looks like the seats are free,
why don't we sit outside?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... What a lovely view. And the breeze feels so
nice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now, what to order? They've got sweet red
bean soup, anmitsu jelly, and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! They have plum-flavored kelp tea!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... How about I order some for us to share?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll find it delicious! Trust me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trusting her judgment, we drink the tea outside.
It has just the right level of sourness to provide a
little kick and warms me all the way to my toes.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm glad you like it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. A while back, some elderly ladies I knew
taught me that this tea is great for a pick-me-up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I used to spend a lot of
time with the older folks who lived in my
neighborhood when I was young.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I often helped my mom and the other
members of the neighborhood association.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We'd have tea together after delivering flyers,
and sometimes they even let me play gateball
with them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I learned all kinds of stuff, like how increasing
your salt intake can relieve fatigue, or that fresh
air can cure most anything.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought some salty plum kelp tea and fresh air
would help you feel better, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you fell asleep on the train, so you must
be really, really tired!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined that she was so concerned about
my well-being...
choice_data_list: I'm feeling much better. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you're welcome! I'm glad I could help!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let me know whenever you feel tired again. I'll
find a way to boost your energy!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I mean, the best scenario is if you didn't get
that tired in the first place, of course!
choice_data_list:
I'll try to pace myself so I don't exhaust myself
again.
But I want to drink this tea again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll pace myself, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Having you worry about me will only tire you out
even more.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I want you to always be beaming like a ray of
sunshine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower pledges to pace herself
moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-that's no reason to push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure any tea we have together will taste just as
great, even if you're not tired!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let me know whenever you want to drink some.
I'll join you anytime!
